models.name: BudgetModel
models.doc: Simple annual budget model tracking income, expenses, and net balance.

other_income.doc: Other income per year (freelance, dividends, etc.)

rows.name: salary
total_income
fixed_expenses
total_expenses
net_budget
savings_rate
cumulative_savings

models.mermaid:
graph TD
    base_salary([base_salary])
    entertainment([entertainment])
    expense_growth([expense_growth])
    food([food])
    housing([housing])
    misc_expenses([misc_expenses])
    other_income([other_income])
    salary_growth([salary_growth])
    transport([transport])
    utilities([utilities])
    cumulative_savings[cumulative_savings]
    fixed_expenses[fixed_expenses]
    net_budget[net_budget]
    salary[salary]
    savings_rate[savings_rate]
    total_expenses[total_expenses]
    total_income[total_income]
    base_salary --> salary
    salary_growth --> salary
    other_income --> total_income
    salary --> total_income
    entertainment --> fixed_expenses
    expense_growth --> fixed_expenses
    food --> fixed_expenses
    housing --> fixed_expenses
    misc_expenses --> fixed_expenses
    transport --> fixed_expenses
    utilities --> fixed_expenses
    fixed_expenses --> total_expenses
    total_expenses --> net_budget
    total_income --> net_budget
    net_budget --> savings_rate
    total_income --> savings_rate
    net_budget --> cumulative_savings
